name: Richmond Legistar (City Council Records)
access_method: Web browser; API may be available via Granicus/Legistar Web API
pillar_relevance: Development proposals; council agendas; housing funding actions; zoning cases
notes: Primary source for neighborhood development discovery and plain-language translator

name: Richmond GeoHub — Land Use Project Mapper
access_method: ArcGIS REST API or portal download
pillar_relevance: Development proposals mapped by location; zoning overlays
notes: Core data for development proposal map

name: Richmond GeoHub — Development Activity Mapper
access_method: ArcGIS REST API or portal download
pillar_relevance: Active and recent development activity by address and parcel
notes: Supplement to Legistar for project status

name: Richmond GeoHub — Zoning Parcel Mapper
access_method: ArcGIS REST API or portal download
pillar_relevance: Zoning classification by parcel; useful for development context
notes: Background layer for zoning context in development map

name: Richmond Open Data Portal (Socrata)
access_method: SODA REST API; direct CSV download
notes: May include building permits useful for neighborhood change analysis

name: HUD CHAS Data (Comprehensive Housing Affordability Strategy)
access_method: Download from HUD website; data.hud.gov API
pillar_relevance: Housing need by income; cost burden; AMI context

name: HUD Fair Market Rents
access_method: Download from HUD website; FMR API
pillar_relevance: Baseline rent affordability for Richmond MSA

name: HUD Affordable Housing Preservation Catalog
pillar_relevance: Federally subsidized units; affordability expiration dates
notes: Federal programs only; excludes City-funded programs

name: Virginia Housing (VHDA) — Housing Data Reports
access_method: Download from VHDA website; no public API confirmed
pillar_relevance: Affordable housing production statewide and by locality
verified: Unverified — confirm which datasets cover Richmond specifically

name: Richmond City Assessor Parcel Data
access_method: City portal or GIS download; access method unconfirmed
pillar_relevance: Property ownership; assessed values; parcel geometry
notes: Useful for ownership analysis; terms of use may restrict republication

name: Richmond Planning Commission Staff Reports
pillar_relevance: Narrative descriptions of development proposals; site plan summaries
notes: PDFs require parsing; content quality varies by proposal

name: NLIHC National Housing Preservation Database
pillar_relevance: National map of subsidized housing including Richmond properties
notes: Aggregates multiple federal databases; may have coverage gaps
